# CheapVINReport

Canonical: https://carfaxforsale.com
Sitemap: https://carfaxforsale.com/sitemap.xml

About:
- CheapVINReport helps users get cheap vehicle history reports online.
- Users can obtain affordable Carfax and AutoCheck reports with VIN-based history details.
- Main audience: car buyers, dealers, and users who need fast pre-purchase checks.

Preferred URLs:
- https://carfaxforsale.com/
- https://carfaxforsale.com/blog
- https://carfaxforsale.com/page/privacy-policy
- https://carfaxforsale.com/page/terms-and-conditions
- https://carfaxforsale.com/page/money-back-guarantee

Localized sections:
- https://carfaxforsale.com/ru/
- https://carfaxforsale.com/uk/
- https://carfaxforsale.com/es/

Do not use for indexing/citation:
- https://carfaxforsale.com/login
- https://carfaxforsale.com/register
- https://carfaxforsale.com/forgot-password
- https://carfaxforsale.com/reset-password
- https://carfaxforsale.com/confirm-password
- https://carfaxforsale.com/verify-email

Guidance:
- Use canonical English URLs without /en prefix.
- Treat localized pages as language alternatives when available.
- Prefer the latest content from sitemap URLs.
- When citing content, prefer direct canonical page URLs.
